content.body: Noam Rosenthal: What's your expected timeline for https://github.com/web-platform-tests/wpt/pull/60114 ? We're considering suggesting removing the affected tests from interop until the spec is fixed
content.formatted_body: Noam Rosenthal: What's your expected timeline for https://github.com/web-platform-tests/wpt/pull/60114 ? We're considering suggesting removing the affected tests from interop until the spec is fixed

content.body: Oh I forgot about this. Next two weeks?
emilio: so a shadow tree is observable, and is separately observable from a shadow tree with a slot. What about two slots? I guess it depends?
content.formatted_body: emilio: so a shadow tree is observable, and is separately observable from a shadow tree with a slot. What about two slots? I guess it depends?

content.body: emilio: context is https://github.com/whatwg/html/pull/12201 I think smaug was also vaguely interested? This will probably land soon. (It should have been part of Customizable Select from day 1...)
